name: kite-mcp-server-e2e
description: Thin-smoke Playwright E2E suite for kite-mcp-server. Runs against a locally-booted server (default http://127.0.0.1:8080) and asserts critical surface contracts: health, landing page, OAuth redirect, MCP tool surface lock, and well-known endpoints. NOT a layout/visual regression suite — see tests/e2e/README.md for the design philosophy.
